title: Add car detail photo upload to price prediction

requirements.summary: Add photo upload field with inline preview to PredictionForm.tsx allowing users to attach and preview multiple car photos before submission
acceptanceCriteria: A photo upload button/dropzone is visible in the prediction form
Users can select one or more image files (JPG, PNG, WEBP) from their device
Selected photos are displayed as thumbnail previews within the form before submission
Users can remove individual photos from the selection before submitting
The form can still be submitted without photos (photos are optional)
Photo upload section is clearly labeled (e.g., 'Add Car Photos (Optional)')

file_operations.description: Add a photo upload section to the form with file input, thumbnail preview grid, and remove buttons. Store selected files in component state as an array of File objects. Convert files to base64-encoded strings before passing to the prediction mutation. Add a labeled section 'Add Car Photos (Optional)' with file input accepting image/jpeg,image/png,image/webp. Display selected photos as thumbnail previews in a responsive grid layout with individual remove buttons. Ensure the form remains fully functional without photos.

requirements.summary: Update prediction history view to display thumbnail photos for predictions that included photos at submission time
acceptanceCriteria: Prediction history entries that include photos show at least one thumbnail image
Thumbnails are small and do not disrupt the layout of the history list
Entries without photos render normally without any broken image placeholder

file_operations.description: Create a new component that fetches and displays prediction history using the useGetPredictionHistory hook. For each history entry, render the car specifications and prediction results. If the CarSpecs object includes a photos array with ExternalBlob instances, display the first photo as a small thumbnail (e.g., 80x80px) using the ExternalBlob getDirectURL() method. Ensure entries without photos render normally without broken placeholders. Use the blob-storage component's ExternalBlob class to handle photo URLs. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.

Import and render the new PredictionHistory component in the main app layout, placing it below the PredictionForm or in a dedicated section visible to authenticated users. Ensure it only displays when the user is logged in and has a profile.

requirements.summary: Update the prediction mutation in useQueries.ts to accept and pass photo data (base64 strings array) to the backend actor call
acceptanceCriteria: The prediction mutation hook accepts an optional photos array parameter
Photos are included in the backend actor call payload
If no photos are provided, an empty array or null is passed gracefully

file_operations.description: Update the usePredictCarPrice mutation to accept an optional photos parameter (array of base64-encoded strings). Convert the base64 strings to ExternalBlob instances using ExternalBlob.fromBytes() before passing to the backend actor's predictCarPrice method. Update the CarSpecs payload to include the photos array. If no photos are provided, pass an empty array or omit the field. Use the blob-storage component to handle photo conversion. Verify the component's usage instructions before implementing.
